dialogues.title: Im Cafe bestellen
dialogues.description: A practical cafe conversation for ordering a drink, asking the price, and paying politely.
dialogues.learnerGoal: Order a drink in German and complete a short payment exchange.

translations.text: Good morning. What would you like?
صبح بخیر. چه چیزی میل دارید؟
Beyaniya te bixêr. Tu çi dixwazî?
Доброе утро. Что бы вы хотели?
I would like a coffee, please.
As dori o cafea, va rog.
Bi kêfxweşî. Ew sê euro ye.
Here you are. Thank you very much.
Ev e, ji kerema xwe. Gelek spas.
Would you like milk or sugar?
Czy chce Pan/Pani mleko albo cukier?
Şîr, ji kerema xwe. Bê şekir.
To go or to drink here?
Ji bo birinê an li vir vexwarinê?
С собой или будете пить здесь?
Me vete apo për ta pirë këtu?
Li vir vexwarin, ji kerema xwe.
Për ta pirë këtu, ju lutem.
Here you are. Have a nice day.
Spas, her wiha. Bi xatirê te.

usefulPhrases.usageNote: Use this when you need the price.

questions.prompt: Welche Antwort ist beim Bestellen passend?

translations.text: کدام پاسخ هنگام سفارش دادن مناسب است؟
Kîjan bersiv ji bo siparîşê guncan e?
Care raspuns se potriveste cand comanzi?
Cila pergjigje eshte e pershtatshme kur porosit?
I would like a coffee, please.
As dori o cafea, va rog.

answers.feedback: Use moechte for ordering, not bin.

dialogues.title: Nach dem Weg fragen
dialogues.description: A short street conversation for asking where the station is and understanding simple directions.
dialogues.learnerGoal: Ask for directions and follow basic left/right instructions.

translations.text: Excuse me, where is the train station?
Bibore, stasyona trenê li ku ye?
Me falni, ku eshte stacioni i trenit?

dialogueTurns.baseText: Gehen Sie geradeaus und dann links.

translations.text: Go straight ahead and then left.
Prosze isc prosto, a potem w lewo.
Mergeti drept inainte si apoi la stanga.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Nein, nur fuenf Minuten zu Fuss.

translations.text: نەخێر، تەنها پێنج خولەک بە پێ.
No, only five minutes on foot.
Na, tenê pênc xulek bi piyan.
Nu, doar cinci minute pe jos.
Jo, vetem pese minuta ne kembe.
Do I have to cross the street?

dialogueTurns.baseText: Ja, an der Ampel gehen Sie rechts.

translations.text: نعم، عند إشارة المرور اذهب يمينا.
بەڵێ، لە چرای هاتوچۆ بۆ ڕاست بچۆ.
Yes, turn right at the traffic light.
بله، سر چراغ راهنمایی به راست بروید.
Erê, li ronahiya trafîkê rastê here.
Tak, przy światłach proszę iść w prawo.
Da, la semafor mergeți la dreapta.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Ist der Bahnhof auf der rechten Seite?

translations.text: Is the station on the right side?
Czy dworzec jest po prawej stronie?
A është stacioni në anën e djathtë?

dialogueTurns.baseText: Ja, der Eingang ist neben der Apotheke.

translations.text: Yes, the entrance is next to the pharmacy.
Erê, derî li kêleka dermanxaneyê ye.
Thank you very much for your help.
Gelek spas ji bo alîkariya we.
You are welcome. Have a good trip.
خواهش می‌کنم. سفر خوبی داشته باشید.
Nie ma za co. Dobrej podróży.

dialogues.title: Einen Arzttermin vereinbaren
dialogues.description: A useful phone conversation for making a doctor's appointment and explaining a simple symptom.
dialogues.learnerGoal: Make an appointment, state the problem, and confirm the time.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Guten Tag, ich brauche einen Termin.

translations.text: Good day, I need an appointment.
روز بخیر، من به یک وقت ملاقات نیاز دارم.
Roj baş, min hewceyê randevuyekê heye.
Buna ziua, am nevoie de o programare.
Iyi gunler, bir randevuya ihtiyacim var.
لدي ألم في الحلق منذ أمس.
I have had a sore throat since yesterday.
Ji duh ve êşa qirika min heye.
У меня болит горло со вчерашнего дня.
Kam dhimbje fyti qe nga dje.
Do you have a fever or a cough?
Taya we an kuxika we heye?
Czy ma Pan/Pani gorączkę albo kaszel?
У вас есть температура или кашель?

dialogueTurns.baseText: Ja, ich habe auch etwas Fieber.

translations.text: Yes, I also have a slight fever.
Erê, hinek tayê min jî heye.
Да, у меня также небольшая температура.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Wir haben morgen um zehn Uhr einen Termin frei.

translations.text: لدينا موعد متاح غدا الساعة العاشرة.
سبەی کاتژمێر دە کاتێکی بەتاڵمان هەیە.
We have an appointment available tomorrow at ten o’clock.
فردا ساعت ده وقت خالی داریم.
Em sibê saet deh randevuyek vala heye.
Mamy wolny termin jutro o dziesiątej.
Avem o programare liberă mâine la ora zece.
У нас есть свободное время завтра в десять.
Kemi një takim të lirë nesër në orën dhjetë.
Yarın saat onda boş randevumuz var.
Navê we çi ye, ji kerema xwe?

dialogueTurns.baseText: Gut, bitte bringen Sie Ihre Versichertenkarte mit.

translations.text: حسنا، من فضلك أحضر بطاقة التأمين.
Good, please bring your insurance card.
خوب، لطفاً کارت بیمه‌تان را همراه بیاورید.
Baş e, ji kerema xwe karta bîmeyê bîne.
Bine, vă rog să aduceți cardul de asigurare.
Mirë, ju lutem sillni kartën e sigurimit.

dialogueTurns.baseText: Danke. Dann komme ich morgen um zehn.

translations.text: شكرا. إذن آتي غدا الساعة العاشرة.
سوپاس. ئەوا سبەی کاتژمێر دە دێم.
Thank you. Then I will come tomorrow at ten.
ممنون. پس فردا ساعت ده می‌آیم.
Spas. Wê demê ez sibê saet deh têm.
Dziękuję. W takim razie przyjdę jutro o dziesiątej.
Mulțumesc. Atunci vin mâine la zece.
Спасибо. Тогда я приду завтра в десять.
Faleminderit. Atëherë vij nesër në dhjetë.
Teşekkürler. O zaman yarın saat onda geliyorum.

usefulPhrases.usageNote: Use for medical offices, authorities, and services.

translations.text: من به یک وقت ملاقات نیاز دارم.

usefulPhrases.usageNote: Use seit with a starting point in the past.

translations.text: کدام جمله یک علامت بیماری را توصیف می‌کند؟

answers.feedback: This gives a name, not a symptom.
